name: Double Orange Cake-Mix
recipeInstructions:
To make sour milk, place 2 teaspoons vinegar in a measuring cup and fill to 2/3 cup mark with milk.
Or finely chopped. Beat eggs well in a bowl. Stir in buttermilk, 1/2 cup sugar, orange peel, and raisins. Add mix and baking soda. Beat well. Pour into an 8 by 8 by 2-inch pan with the bottom rubbed with shortening. Bake in a 350 F oven for about 30 minutes.
Combine orange juice and 1/4 cup sugar in a bowl, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Pour over the hot cake. Cool. Yield: One 8-inch square cake.
